articles.title: UBS profits rocket 80% to $3 billion for first quarter beat - CNBC
articles.description: UBS reported its first quarter earnings on Wednesday, with net profits beating analyst estimates.

articles.title: Australia reports lower-than-expected first-quarter inflation — but price rise highest in 2 years - CNBC
articles.description: The first-quarter inflation figure was lower than the 4.2% expected by economists polled by Reuters.

articles.title: Meta is paying top executives to hit a $9.5 trillion valuation—and no one’s ever done it before - Fortune
articles.description: The deepest tranche of options won’t fully pay off unless Meta becomes nearly twice the size of Nvidia.

articles.title: S&P 500 futures are flat as Wall Street looks ahead to ‘Mag 7’ earnings and Fed decision: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: On Tuesday, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite slipped from the the records they notched a day earlier.

articles.title: Elon gets his day in trial against OpenAI - Axios
articles.description: Musk took the stand as the first witness in his billion dollar lawsuit against OpenAI on Tuesday.

articles.title: Robinhood stock falls 8% after big earnings miss due to weak crypto trading revenue - CoinDesk
articles.description: While the trading platform’s crypto revenue tanked 47% to $134 million, a record-breaking surge in prediction market bets helped push overall revenue up 15% to $1.07 billion.

articles.title: Nvidia Stock Drops. Why Chip Stocks Keep Getting Hit. - Barron's
articles.description: Nvidia stock, Advanced Micro Devices and Broadcom were all dropping amid worries about the sustainability of OpenAI's spending.

articles.title: White House huddles with tech firms as Mythos raises cyber stakes - Politico
articles.description: National Cyber Director Sean Cairncross is expected to chair the discussion, which will also focus broadly on cybersecurity and AI-related topics.

articles.title: Disney has decided to keep ESPN - Business Insider
articles.description: Disney had previously considered spinning out the sports network. New CEO Josh D'Amaro has decided not to, people familiar with the matter said.

articles.title: Brown-Forman and Pernod Ricard Terminate Discussions Regarding Potential Combination (April 28, 2026) - Brown-Forman
Kone Is Said to Near €29 Billion Deal for Rival TK Elevator - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Kone Oyj is nearing a cash-and-stock deal to acquire TK Elevator, people familiar with the matter said, in what will be one of the biggest-ever private equity exits in Europe.

articles.title: Here's everything to expect when the Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday - CNBC
articles.description: In what could be Jerome Powell's final meeting as Fed chair, he and his fellow policymakers are likely to continue their cautious approach.

articles.title: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS - TechCrunch
articles.description: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

articles.title: ‘Horsesh*t’: Hill Republicans align against Spirit’s bid for a Trump bailout - Semafor
articles.description: As the president considers a government lifeline for the struggling airline, a wide swath of his party wants no part of it.

articles.title: Starbucks raises full-year outlook as turnaround takes hold — despite higher gas prices - CNBC
articles.description: Starbucks' global same-store sales, which only includes cafes open at least a year, increased 6.2%, fueled by more visits to its locations.

articles.title: JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon warns of looming bond market crisis (JPM:NYSE) - Seeking Alpha
articles.description: JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon warns a bond market crisis may be looming, citing deficits, geopolitics and oil risks. Read more here.

articles.title: American Airlines CEO Rejects United Merger, Hints At Alaska Deal - Live and Let's Fly
articles.description: American Airlines CEO Robert Isom says a merger with United is a nonstarter, but hints that closer ties with Alaska Airlines could continue.

articles.title: Big Tech Earnings Preview: Are AI Investments Paying Off for Microsoft, Alphabet, Meta, and Amazon? - TipRanks
